name: affine-refactor-validation-20260404-dropbear
args:
apt-get update && DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y dropbear-bin openssh-client rsync screen git curl python3 python3-pip python3-venv jq && mkdir -p /root/.ssh /etc/dropbear && chmod 700 /root/.ssh && printf '%s
' 'ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAAIODJKmWcysaEqnHawv5eHA1/D2Up1CuMJ1mLb23qFt9y wangtong91347625@gmail.com' > /root/.ssh/authorized_keys && chmod 600 /root/.ssh/authorized_keys && echo auth_keys_written && dropbear -R -F -E -p 2222 -s
